BaseTemplate.description: Web app to manage subscriptions on DIMO

Index.meta_description: Manage device subscriptions and connected vehicles through the DIMO ecosystem.

SignIn.meta_description: Seamlessly sign in to your account with our user-friendly login process.

SignUp.meta_description: Effortlessly create an account through our intuitive sign-up process.

PaymentMethods.meta_description: Manage your saved payment methods and billing information.
PaymentMethods.title: Payment Methods
PaymentMethods.description: Manage your saved payment methods for subscriptions and billing.

Parking.hub_description: When you park in supported Metro Detroit areas with an eligible connected vehicle, DIMO Driver can send you here to pay for parking. DIMO completes checkout using your corporate account.
Parking.history_empty: No parking sessions yet. You will see sessions here after parking assist notifies you.
Parking.session_description: Pay for parking with DIMO. We complete checkout with your selected parking service on your behalf.
Parking.session_load_error: Could not load this parking session.
Parking.license_plate_missing_hint: Add your license plate in the DIMO app under Vehicle settings → Registration details, then refresh this page.
Parking.license_plate_required_error: A license plate is required before you can pay for parking.
Parking.catalog_load_error: Could not load parking options. Refresh the page or try again later.
Parking.duration_missing_hint: Select how long you want to park before paying.
Parking.duration_minutes_required_error: Select a parking duration before paying.
Parking.duration_minutes_invalid_error: That duration is not available for this parking service.
Parking.parking_service_invalid_error: Select a valid parking service before paying.
Parking.zone_sign_hint: Enter the zone or space number shown on the parking sign where you parked.
Parking.zone_code_missing_hint: Enter the zone or space code from the parking sign before paying.
Parking.zone_code_required_error: A zone or space code from the parking sign is required before you can pay.
Parking.pay_error: Could not start payment. Try again.
Parking.no_payment_required_message: No metered payment is required right now for this zone. Posted sign restrictions still apply. You can try again during metered hours if payment becomes necessary.
Parking.pending_queued_message: Payment is still processing. Tap Refresh to check the latest status.
Parking.pay_submitted_message: Your payment was submitted. You can close this page. We'll send a notification when checkout finishes (usually within a few minutes). Tap Refresh if you're still here.
